item.title: LogicGrid 10.1.5
item.description:
LogicGrid 10.1.5

Fixed

  • Localization update — users with a Mac set to something other than English should now have correct grid drawing by selecting "Structural AX Walk" in Advanced under Settings.
  • If LogicGrid detects your Mac is set to something other than English, this option is automatically selected.

New

  • "Export Diagnostics" button in the bug report window. One click drops a log file on your Desktop with everything we need to debug an issue.
